name: Hearthside Cheddar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Grease and flour a 9 X 5-inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and ground cinnamon.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
5. Add the milk, vegetable oil, and eggs to the well.
6. Stir until thoroughly combined.
7. Gently stir in the chopped cooking apples, shredded sharp cheddar cheese, and chopped walnuts.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the loaf is browned and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
9. Cool in the pan on a rack for 5 minutes.
10. Remove from the pan and cool to room temperature on a wire rack before slicing.
